global.description: The ad features a prominent logo and a clear call to action with a discount offer.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to install the app with a discount offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: BoltCart logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo with the text 'BoltCart' prominently displayed in a bright color.

elements.label: Discount offer
elements.description: Text that reads 'Up to 40% off' in a clear, readable font, emphasizing the discount.

elements.label: Shop bestsellers
elements.description: Smaller text below the discount offer that says 'Shop bestsellers now', inviting action.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A subtle background shape that adds depth, possibly in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Install now', designed to attract clicks.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear and inviting button labeled 'Install now', designed to prompt user interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text, with the CTA button at the bottom.
